title: FULLY FREE GLM-5.2 + Z-Code: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
summary: Z Code is a Codex-like coding agent built for GLM models with a free tier offering 5 million tokens daily. It supports code generation, project creation, live previews, and DevTools integration, though file explorer and git initialization features are not yet available.
writeup: The video covers Z-Code, a Codex-like coding agent built for GLM models, paired with GLM-5.2, and walks through its capabilities and current limits. Its free tier provides 5 million tokens daily, lowering the cost barrier for an agentic coding workflow. Z-Code supports code generation, project creation, live previews, and DevTools integration. File explorer and git initialization are not yet available.
